title: Touchshifter
abstract: The invention relates to an operating device (1) for a shift by wire assembly in an automobile comprising a touch sensitive display (3) for selecting an Operation mode (R, N, D, B) of an automatic and/or automatized transmission of the automobile, further comprising a haptic guide element (5) that serves to guide a touch gesture of an Operator (V) corresponding to the selection of the Operation mode (R, N, D, B), wherein the touch sensitive display (3) is configured to display an image (7), said image (7) being a graphical, interactive user-interface object, which can be moved with the touch gesture of the Operator (V) into a predetermined area (9) of the touch sensitive display (3) for selecting the Operation mode (R, N, D, B), and wherein the haptic guide element (5) provides at least one selection path (11) along which the image (7) can be moved.
claims: Claims Claims 1 . Operating device (1 ) for a shift by wire assembly in an automobile comprising a touch sensitive display (3) for selecting an operation mode (R, N, D, B) of an automatic and/or automatized transmission of the automobile, further comprising a haptic guide element (5) that serves to guide a touch gesture of an operator (V) corresponding to the selection of the operation mode (R, N, D, B), characterized in that the touch sensitive display (3) is configured to display an image (7), said image (7) being a graphical, interactive user-interface object, which can be moved with the touch gesture of the operator (V) into a predetermined area (9) of the touch sensitive display (3) for selecting the operation mode (R, N, D, B), and in that the haptic guide element (5) provides at least one selection path (1 1 ) along which the image (7) can be moved. 2. Operating device (1 ) according to claim 1 , characterized in that the at least one selection path (1 1 ) comprises a first segment (13) and a second segment (15), wherein the first segment (13) is oriented such that the image (7) can be moved along a first direction (X1 ) and the second segment (15) is oriented such that the image (7) can be moved along a second direction (X2, X3), the second direction (X2, X3) being different from the first direction (X1 ) and not the opposite of the first direction (X1 ). 3. Operating device (1 ) according to claim 1 or 2, characterized in that the touch sensitive display (3) is configured to display the image (7) at a start position (17) and/or move the image (7) to the start position (17) in a passive operating state, and is configured to display the image (7) according to the touch gesture of the operator (V) in an active operating state, wherein the touch sensitive display (3) transitions to the passive operating state after the operation mode (R, N, D, B) of the transmission has been selected. 4. Operating device (1 ) according to at least one of the previous claims, characterized in that the selection path (1 1 ) comprises a transition area (19) between the first segment (13) and the second segment (15), and that when the operator (V) touch gesture moves the image (7) into said transitional area (19), an operation mode (N) of the transmission is selected in which an interruption in torque transmission occurs. 5. Operating device (1 ) according to at least one of the previous claims, characterized in that the haptic guide element (5) provides more than one selection path (1 1 ), and in that each selection path (1 1 ) is geometrically unique from all other selection paths (1 1 ) provided by the haptic guide element (5). 6. Operating device (1 ) according to at least one of the previous claims, characterized in that the predetermined area (9) for selecting the operation mode (R, N, D, B) of the transmission is displayed on the touch sensitive display (3). 7. Operating device (1 ) according to at least one of the previous claims, characterized in that a braking selection path (1 1 b) is provided to increase the engine braking and/or electric motor braking of the automobile, and in that the engine braking and/or electric motor braking can be incrementally increased in accordance with the distance the image (7) is moved by the touch gesture of the operator (V). 8. Operating device (1 ) according to at least one of the previous claims, characterized in that the haptic guide element (5) is a molded plastic element wherein the selection path (1 1 ) is formed by an elevated and/or depressed contour (21 ) of the molded plastic element. 9. Operating device (1 ) according to at least one of the previous claims, characterized in that a surface of the haptic guide element (5) comprises at least two surface textures, the textures being comprised by the surface of the touch sensitive display (3) and/or a molded plastic attachment of the touch sensitive display (3). 10. Operating device (1 ) according to at least one of the previous claims, characterized in that haptic guide element (5) comprises an electrostatic layer for inducing tactile response on the surface of the touch sensitive display (3).
